name: Content Stale Assessment After Rework Pipeline
description: Revision-aware content workflow that rejects stale assessments from older revisions.
outcome: Only the active subject revision may clear the workflow after rework.

definition.process_instructions: The content strategist defines the work. The content author revises it over multiple drafts. Assessors may complete out of order, but stale older assessments must never clear the current draft revision.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.
